widgets_values: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
The young woman say " <Transcript1> ", while she is speak with her mouth, expressive tone—clear, friendly, and slightly animated—her voice natural.

Use : say "<Transcript1>"

in your text prompt for whatever you want the character to say. 

It will refer to the audio vocals.
And Link up "text_transcript" to the replace field in Replace node.
